type.description: The type of request, e.g., 'game' or 'system'.

system.description: The console/system for a game request.

name.description: The name of the requested game or system.

link.description: An optional link for the request.

requester.description: The username of the person making the request.

timestamp.description: The ISO timestamp of when the request was made.

description.description: A detailed description of the bug.

reporter.description: The username of the person reporting the bug.

timestamp.description: The ISO timestamp of when the report was made.

title.description: The question or title of the FAQ entry.

content.description: The answer or content of the FAQ entry.

order.description: A number used for sorting the FAQ entries.
